Soal (Indonesia): Ibu membeli {a} kantong beras di pasar. Jika setiap kantong beras memiliki berat {b} kilogram, berapa total berat beras yang dibeli Ibu?
Question (English): Mother bought {a} bags of rice at the market. If each bag of rice weighs {b} kilograms, what is the total weight of the rice she bought?

Soal (Indonesia): Adik menabung selama {a} hari penuh. Jika setiap hari ia memasukkan uang sebesar {b} rupiah ke celengannya, berapa jumlah uang tabungan Adik sekarang?
Question (English): Younger sibling has been saving for {a} full days. If they put {b} rupiah into their piggy bank every day, how much is their total savings now?

Soal (Indonesia): Ayah membeli {a} bungkus roti tawar untuk sarapan. Setiap bungkus berisi {b} lembar roti. Berapa lembar roti seluruhnya?
Question (English): Father bought {a} packs of white bread for breakfast. Each pack contains {b} slices of bread. How many slices of bread are there in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Ibu membuat kue bolu pandan sebanyak {a} loyang. Jika setiap loyang dipotong menjadi {b} bagian, berapa banyak potongan kue bolu seluruhnya?
Question (English): Mother made {a} pans of pandan sponge cake. If each pan is cut into {b} pieces, how many pieces of sponge cake are there in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Doni membeli {a} kotak pensil untuk dibagikan kepada teman-temannya. Jika di dalam satu kotak terdapat {b} batang pensil, berapa banyak pensil Doni seluruhnya?
Question (English): Doni bought {a} pencil boxes to distribute to his friends. If there are {b} pencils in one box, how many pencils does Doni have in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Di atas meja makan terdapat {a} piring gorengan. Di setiap piring diletakkan {b} buah gorengan. Berapa total gorengan yang disajikan?
Question (English): On the dining table, there are {a} plates of fried snacks. On each plate, {b} fried snacks are placed. How many fried snacks are served in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Tukang sate membakar {a} porsi sate ayam. Jika setiap porsi berisi {b} tusuk sate, berapa total tusuk sate yang dibakar?
Question (English): The satay vendor grills {a} portions of chicken satay. If each portion contains {b} skewers of satay, how many skewers of satay are grilled in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Ayah membeli {a} kotak lampu LED untuk mengganti lampu yang rusak. Tiap kotak berisi {b} buah bola lampu. Berapa lampu LED yang dibeli Ayah?
Question (English): Father bought {a} boxes of LED bulbs to replace broken lights. Each box contains {b} light bulbs. How many LED lights did Father buy?

Soal (Indonesia): Kakak menyusun pakaian ke dalam lemari sebanyak {a} tumpuk. Jika setiap tumpuk berisi {b} potong pakaian, berapa total pakaian yang dirapikan Kakak?
Question (English): Older sibling arranged clothes into the wardrobe in {a} stacks. If each stack contains {b} pieces of clothing, how many clothes did they tidy up in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Sinta membagikan {a} kotak bingkisan makanan ringan pada hari ulang tahunnya. Di dalam setiap kotak ada {b} bungkus biskuit cokelat. Berapa banyak bungkus biskuit yang dibagikan?
Question (English): On her birthday, Sinta distributed {a} gift boxes of snacks. Inside each box, there are {b} packs of chocolate biscuits. How many packs of biscuits were distributed?

Soal (Indonesia): Di sebuah toko kue, terdapat {a} toples nastar yang dipajang. Jika masing-masing toples berisi {b} kue nastar, berapa total kue nastar di toko itu?
Question (English): In a cake shop, there are {a} jars of nastar (pineapple tarts) on display. If each jar contains {b} nastar cakes, what is the total number of nastar cakes in the shop?

Soal (Indonesia): Seorang pedagang buah memiliki {a} keranjang mangga. Jika setiap keranjang berisi {b} buah mangga, berapa jumlah seluruh mangga milik pedagang tersebut?
Question (English): A fruit trader has {a} baskets of mangoes. If each basket contains {b} mangoes, what is the total number of mangoes owned by the trader?

Soal (Indonesia): Ibu mencuci pakaian menggunakan mesin cuci sebanyak {a} kali siklus putaran. Jika tiap putaran memuat maksimal {b} potong pakaian, berapa total pakaian yang dicuci Ibu?
Question (English): Mother washed clothes using the washing machine for {a} cycles. If each cycle holds a maximum of {b} pieces of clothing, how many clothes did Mother wash in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Di dalam sebuah kelas terdapat {a} baris meja siswa. Jika setiap baris diisi oleh {b} siswa, berapa jumlah seluruh siswa di kelas tersebut?
Question (English): In a classroom, there are {a} rows of student desks. If each row is filled by {b} students, what is the total number of students in the classroom?

Soal (Indonesia): Pak Guru membawa {a} kotak kapur tulis ke ruang kelas. Setiap kotak berisi {b} batang kapur. Berapa total kapur tulis yang dibawa Pak Guru?
Question (English): The teacher brought {a} boxes of chalk to the classroom. Each box contains {b} sticks of chalk. How many pieces of chalk did the teacher bring in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Kakak membeli {a} sisir pisang di pasar. Jika setiap sisir terdiri dari {b} buah pisang, berapa banyak buah pisang yang dibeli Kakak?
Question (English): Older sibling bought {a} bunches of bananas at the market. If each bunch consists of {b} bananas, how many bananas did they buy?

Soal (Indonesia): Di rak sepatu terdapat {a} susun laci. Jika setiap susun memuat {b} pasang sepatu, berapa banyak pasang sepatu yang ada di rak tersebut?
Question (English): On the shoe rack, there are {a} tiers of drawers. If each tier holds {b} pairs of shoes, how many pairs of shoes are on the rack?

Soal (Indonesia): Ayah membeli {a} dus mi instan untuk persediaan di rumah. Jika setiap dus berisi {b} bungkus mi instan, berapa banyak mi instan yang dibeli Ayah?
Question (English): Father bought {a} boxes of instant noodles for stock at home. If each box contains {b} packs of instant noodles, how many instant noodles did Father buy?

Soal (Indonesia): Dalam satu set cangkir teh terdapat {a} buah tatakan piring kecil. Jika Ibu membeli {b} set cangkir teh, berapa banyak tatakan piring kecil seluruhnya?
Question (English): In one teacup set, there are {a} small saucers. If Mother buys {b} teacup sets, how many small saucers are there in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Ibu memotong gulungan kain untuk membuat tirai jendela sebanyak {a} helai. Jika tiap helai kain panjangnya {b} meter, berapa meter total kain yang digunakan?
Question (English): Mother cut rolls of fabric to make window curtains into {a} sheets. If each sheet of fabric is {b} meters long, how many meters of fabric were used in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Sebuah rumah makan menyediakan {a} meja makan. Jika setiap meja dilengkapi dengan {b} buah kursi, berapa kapasitas total kursi di rumah makan tersebut?
Question (English): A restaurant provides {a} dining tables. If each table is equipped with {b} chairs, what is the total capacity of chairs in the restaurant?

Soal (Indonesia): Budi memesan {a} kotak piza ukuran besar. Jika masing-masing kotak berisi {b} potong piza, berapa total potong piza seluruhnya?
Question (English): Budi ordered {a} large pizza boxes. If each box contains {b} slices of pizza, how many total slices of pizza are there?

Soal (Indonesia): Petugas kebersihan kompleks mengambil air menggunakan {a} ember penuh. Jika volume setiap ember adalah {b} liter, berapa liter air yang digunakan?
Question (English): The complex janitor fetched water using {a} full buckets. If the volume of each bucket is {b} liters, how many liters of water were used?

Soal (Indonesia): Kakek harus meminum suplemen vitamin rutin selama {a} hari. Jika dalam satu hari ia disarankan minum {b} butir kapsul, berapa butir kapsul yang dihabiskan Kakek?
Question (English): Grandfather has to take routine vitamin supplements for {a} days. If he is advised to take {b} capsules in one day, how many capsules will Grandfather finish?

Soal (Indonesia): Seorang anak membeli {a} bungkus permen. Jika setiap bungkus berisi {b} butir permen, berapa jumlah seluruh permen yang dibeli anak tersebut?
Question (English): A child bought {a} packs of candy. If each pack contains {b} candies, what is the total number of candies bought by the child?

Soal (Indonesia): Ibu membeli {a} ikat bayam di tukang sayur. Jika setiap ikat bayam harganya {b} rupiah, berapa total uang yang harus dibayar Ibu?
Question (English): Mother bought {a} bunches of spinach from the vegetable vendor. If each bunch of spinach costs {b} rupiah, how much money does Mother have to pay in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Kakak merapikan koleksi buku ceritanya ke dalam {a} rak buku. Jika masing-masing rak dapat memuat {b} buku, berapa kapasitas maksimal buku yang bisa ditampung?
Question (English): Older sibling neatly arranged their collection of storybooks into {a} bookshelves. If each shelf can hold {b} books, what is the maximum capacity of books that can be accommodated?

Soal (Indonesia): Di sebuah minimarket, petugas merapikan {a} baris sabun mandi di etalase. Setiap baris terdiri dari {b} sabun mandi. Berapa jumlah sabun mandi yang dirapikan?
Question (English): In a minimarket, the staff organized {a} rows of bath soap on the display window. Each row consists of {b} bars of soap. How many bars of soap were organized?

Soal (Indonesia): Di tempat parkir minimarket, terdapat {a} baris khusus sepeda motor. Jika setiap baris maksimal bisa menampung {b} sepeda motor, berapa kapasitas total parkir motor tersebut?
Question (English): In the minimarket parking lot, there are {a} rows designated for motorcycles. If each row can accommodate a maximum of {b} motorcycles, what is the total capacity of the motorcycle parking?

Soal (Indonesia): Guru olahraga memerintahkan siswa untuk berlari mengelilingi lapangan sebanyak {a} putaran. Jika panjang lintasan satu putaran adalah {b} meter, berapa meter jarak total lari tersebut?
Question (English): The sports teacher ordered the students to run around the field for {a} laps. If the length of one lap is {b} meters, how many meters is the total running distance?

Soal (Indonesia): Seorang kurir mengirimkan {a} paket ke sebuah alamat rumah. Jika setiap paket memiliki berat {b} kilogram, berapa berat total paket yang dibawa kurir?
Question (English): A courier delivered {a} packages to a home address. If each package weighs {b} kilograms, what is the total weight of the packages carried by the courier?

Soal (Indonesia): Sebuah toko alat tulis menjual {a} pak buku tulis. Jika satu pak berisi {b} buku, berapa banyak buku tulis seluruhnya?
Question (English): A stationery shop sells {a} packs of notebooks. If one pack contains {b} books, how many notebooks are there in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Panitia arisan keluarga menyediakan {a} kotak kue kotak (snack box). Jika setiap kotak berisi {b} macam kue, berapa total kue yang disediakan?
Question (English): The family gathering committee provided {a} snack boxes. If each box contains {b} types of cakes, how many cakes are provided in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Barista kedai kopi meracik {a} gelas es kopi susu. Setiap gelas membutuhkan {b} mililiter sirup gula. Berapa mililiter sirup yang digunakan seluruhnya?
Question (English): The coffee shop barista mixed {a} glasses of iced coffee milk. Each glass requires {b} milliliters of sugar syrup. How many milliliters of syrup were used in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Ibu membeli {a} papan telur ayam di supermarket. Jika setiap papan berisi {b} butir telur, berapa banyak telur ayam yang dibeli Ibu?
Question (English): Mother bought {a} trays of chicken eggs at the supermarket. If each tray contains {b} eggs, how many chicken eggs did Mother buy?

Soal (Indonesia): Untuk acara makan malam keluarga, Bibi memasak {a} ekor ayam goreng. Jika setiap ekor ayam dipotong menjadi {b} bagian, berapa banyak potongan ayam goreng yang tersedia?
Question (English): For a family dinner, Aunt cooked {a} fried chickens. If each chicken is cut into {b} pieces, how many pieces of fried chicken are available?

Soal (Indonesia): Kakak menempelkan prangko pada {a} buah amplop surat. Jika setiap amplop membutuhkan {b} lembar prangko, berapa banyak prangko yang digunakan Kakak?
Question (English): Older sibling stuck stamps on {a} mailing envelopes. If each envelope requires {b} stamps, how many stamps did they use?

Soal (Indonesia): Sebuah bus kota dapat mengangkut {a} baris kursi penumpang. Jika setiap baris terdiri dari {b} kursi, berapa jumlah total kursi penumpang di dalam bus tersebut?
Question (English): A city bus can accommodate {a} rows of passenger seats. If each row consists of {b} seats, what is the total number of passenger seats inside the bus?

Soal (Indonesia): Di sebuah ruang pertemuan, panitia menyusun {a} baris kursi untuk peserta. Setiap baris disediakan {b} buah kursi. Berapa banyak kursi seluruhnya?
Question (English): In a meeting room, the committee arranged {a} rows of chairs for participants. Each row is provided with {b} chairs. How many chairs are there in total?

Soal (Indonesia): Adik menyusun balok mainan menjadi {a} menara. Jika setiap menara terdiri dari {b} balok kecil, berapa jumlah seluruh balok mainan yang digunakan Adik?
Question (English): Younger sibling assembled toy blocks into {a} towers. If each tower consists of {b} small blocks, what is the total number of toy blocks used?
